composite_description: BEAR cycle with normal conditions -- nothing to do
brief:
BTC trades 6.1% below yesterday's close at $66,981, confirming a BEAR cycle with price below the 200d MA and a death-cross regime. ETH and SOL have underperformed BTC intraday (−6.3% and −7.6% respectively), signaling depressed risk appetite. The composite signal remains NO_ACTION: macro structure is downtrending but orderly, with no extreme derivatives dislocations or panic signals to exploit.

Fear & Greed at 11/100 reflects capitulation sentiment, yet BTC's 5d return of −4% sits only −0.82 standard deviations below mean—a modest drawdown for a bear phase. Stablecoin dominance at 10.98% suggests some defensive positioning but not panic accumulation. Funding data unavailable limits tactical precision, but the absence of extreme bearish crowding removes the edge case that would trigger a dislocation trade.
